title: elymus dahuricus var. xiningensis
intro: Elymus dahuricus var. xiningensis, also known as Xining wild wheat grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Elymus dahuricus var. xiningensis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote health and vitality.
